ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trade_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade category (e.g., Agricultural and allied products) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trade category */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "sub_category_description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade data entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade category */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the trade data */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* Value of trade for that year */,
  "percentage_of_total" REAL /* Percentage of total trade for that year */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-category */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the product is from */,
  "country_of_destination" TEXT /* Country where the product is going */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the trade */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for trade value */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate for the year */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is sensitive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES trade_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES trade_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year as represented in the dataset */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_trade_values" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for total trade entry */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the total trade calculation */,
  "total_trade_value" REAL /* Total value of trade for that year */,
  "total_quantity" REAL /* Total quantity of trade for that year */,
  "average_trade_value" REAL /* Average trade value for that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_trade_values_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade category */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the trend observation */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend observed */,
  "start_year" TEXT /* Start year of the trend */,
  "end_year" TEXT /* End year of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increase, decrease, stabilization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES trade_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report including analysis and data */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is public */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
